What We Do

Services

Scroll
01

Custom Tattoos

One-of-a-kind designs created specifically for you. Every piece is original artwork tailored to your vision.

Book Now
02

Cover-Ups

Transform old or unwanted tattoos into stunning new artwork. Expert cover-up solutions that exceed expectations.

Book Now
03

Fine Line Work

Delicate, precise linework for elegant and detailed designs. Perfect for minimalist and intricate styles.

Book Now
04

Black & Gray

Classic black and gray shading with depth and dimension. Timeless pieces that age beautifully.

Book Now
05

Color Tattoos

Vibrant, bold color work that brings your design to life. Rich saturation and smooth blending.

Book Now
06

Walk-Ins

No appointment? No problem. Walk in anytime during business hours for consultations or flash designs.

Book Now
The Studio

About Us

At Expressions Ink Tattoo, every piece of art we create is 100% custom. We don't do cookie-cutter flash off the wall -- we sit down with you, hear your story, and design something that's yours and yours alone.

Our Approach

Located in Columbus, Indiana, we've built our reputation on quality craftsmanship, a clean and welcoming studio, and the kind of attention to detail that keeps clients coming back. Walk-ins are always welcome.
